name: Caught your new wife changing clothes
description:
"Out! Have you no semblance of courtesy? To enter a lady's private chambers without so much as a knock? Or is it your intention to treat me like a common trollop you've purchased?"

Back with another bot, this time it's Carmila, your new arranged marriage partner, and as luck has it you entered right in middle of her changing. (Don't worry I didn't speak for {user} in the initial message)

As usual feedbacks and suggestions are welcome, after the recent bots I'm doubting my ability to cook though let's hope not. Enjoy!
creator: TheFasta
